title: PDF export mode selection (all vs selected) across non-Budget modules

requirements.summary: Add a consistent export-mode control (all vs selected) to every non-Budget module page that supports PDF export, without changing Budget.
acceptanceCriteria: In each applicable module page, there is an export control (e.g., a dropdown/menu attached to the existing PDF export button) with two choices: “Export all” and “Export selected”.
“Export all” generates a PDF for the currently viewed dataset of that module (consistent with the module’s existing export behavior).
“Export selected” generates a PDF for exactly one record, based on the user’s explicit selection of a record within that module’s UI.
If no record is selected and the user chooses “Export selected”, the UI prevents export and shows a clear error/toast indicating a selection is required.
The control is not added to the Budget module (Budżet page), and Budget export behavior remains unchanged.

file_operations.description: Create a reusable export control that composes existing shadcn/ui primitives (e.g., DropdownMenu/Select + Button) to expose two actions: export all vs export selected, and optionally show current selection status. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add module-level Export PDF mode control using ExportPdfModeControl; implement single-record selection in the table (row click/selection state) and wire export-all vs export-selected actions. Keep existing per-row certificate export available, but ensure the new control supports both modes for the module. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add module-level Export PDF mode control using ExportPdfModeControl; implement single-parishioner selection in both card and list views (single selected uid at a time) and wire export-all vs export-selected actions. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add module-level Export PDF mode control using ExportPdfModeControl; implement single-locality selection (e.g., selected row) and wire export-all vs export-selected actions while preserving existing locality-focused export behavior as the 'selected' mode if applicable. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Replace/augment the existing 'Eksportuj PDF' button with the shared export-mode control; add single-event selection in the list/grid and wire export-all vs export-selected actions. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add module-level Export PDF mode control using ExportPdfModeControl and implement single-letter selection (separate from edit state) so the user can export all letters or exactly one selected letter; keep existing per-letter export action working. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add export-mode control using ExportPdfModeControl and implement selection for exactly one record within the currently active tab (individual assignment or locality assignment), enabling export all vs export selected. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

If the page has PDF export, update it to use ExportPdfModeControl and add single-note selection for 'export selected' while keeping existing 'export all' behavior. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

If the page has PDF export, update it to use ExportPdfModeControl and add single-statistic-entry selection for 'export selected' while keeping existing 'export all' behavior. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

If the dashboard exposes PDF export actions, ensure any module-level export control added follows the same export-mode pattern (all vs selected) where a selectable list exists; do not introduce new Budget export mode selection here. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement single-record selection + single-record PDF exports per module using existing PDF generators where possible, and add reasonable single-record PDFs where missing.
acceptanceCriteria: Baptisms: users can still export a single baptism certificate PDF for a record, and additionally can export the entire baptisms registry list to PDF from the module-level export control.

Localities: users can export a PDF for a single locality (e.g., the locality currently selected / invoked from a row), and can export a PDF covering the full localities list from the module-level export control.
Events: users can export a PDF for a single event and a PDF for the full events list.
Correspondence: users can export a PDF for a single letter and a PDF for the full letters list.
Kartoteka (parishioners): users can export a PDF for a single parishioner and a PDF for the full parishioners list.
Any other non-Budget module that currently has a PDF export button also offers the same two export modes (all vs single).

file_operations.description: Add/extend PDF generator helpers to support missing single-record and full-list exports needed by the new export modes (e.g., baptism registry list PDF, single parishioner summary PDF, single locality PDF, localities list PDF, single event PDF, letters list PDF, single parish function assignment PDF, etc.), implemented by composing the existing branded HTML/print flow. Ensure existing generators (e.g., baptism certificate, letter PDF, events PDF, parish functions PDF) continue to work unchanged for their prior call sites.

Wire export-all to a new baptism-registry list PDF generation path (consistent with current registry filters/pagination as currently displayed), and wire export-selected to the selected record's certificate PDF (or selected-record PDF flow as required). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire export-all to existing parishioners list PDF behavior; implement export-selected to generate a single parishioner PDF summary from the currently selected parishioner, including key fields shown in UI. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire export-selected to generate a single locality PDF (e.g., details + residents/tasks as appropriate to existing behavior) based on selected locality; wire export-all to generate a PDF that covers the full localities list (reasonable summary of each locality). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire export-all to the existing full events PDF generator; implement export-selected to generate a single event PDF (title, date, description, tasks) for the selected event. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire export-selected to the existing single-letter PDF generator for the selected letter; implement export-all to generate a reasonable full letters list PDF (numbers, titles, dates, optional excerpts) consistent with app style. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire export-all to existing full parish-functions PDF generator; implement export-selected to generate a single-record PDF for whichever record type is selected in the active tab. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

If applicable, implement export-selected to generate a single note PDF based on selection, and ensure export-all remains consistent with prior behavior. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

If applicable, implement export-selected to generate a single statistic entry PDF based on selection, and ensure export-all remains consistent with prior behavior. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Localize and standardize all new export-mode labels, prompts, and error toasts across modules without regressing existing exports.
acceptanceCriteria: New menu items, button titles, and toasts introduced for this feature use consistent terminology across modules.
No existing PDF export actions regress (still work as before) after adding the mode selection UI.

file_operations.description: Standardize labels and accessible titles for the two export choices (consistent Polish UI strings, e.g., 'Eksportuj wszystko' and 'Eksportuj zaznaczone') and centralize the 'selection required' UX (e.g., a shared toast message) so all modules behave consistently. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Adopt the shared labels/toasts from ExportPdfModeControl and ensure the 'export selected' guard triggers the same localized message when no row is selected. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Adopt the shared labels/toasts from ExportPdfModeControl and ensure the 'export selected' guard triggers the same localized message when no parishioner is selected. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Adopt the shared labels/toasts from ExportPdfModeControl and ensure the 'export selected' guard triggers the same localized message when no locality is selected. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Adopt the shared labels/toasts from ExportPdfModeControl and ensure the 'export selected' guard triggers the same localized message when no event is selected. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Adopt the shared labels/toasts from ExportPdfModeControl and ensure the 'export selected' guard triggers the same localized message when no letter is selected. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Adopt the shared labels/toasts from ExportPdfModeControl and ensure the 'export selected' guard triggers the same localized message when no assignment is selected in the active tab. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
If export exists, adopt shared labels/toasts and guard behavior; ensure prior export actions still work as before. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
If export exists, adopt shared labels/toasts and guard behavior; ensure prior export actions still work as before. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
